title: Commons
description: JSON schema for Gooddata Analytics Commons Objects

attributeIdentifier.title: Attribute Identifier
attributeIdentifier.description: A attribute identifier in the form of attribute/{id}.

labelIdentifier.title: Label Identifier
labelIdentifier.description: A label identifier in the form of label/{id}.

displayAsLabelIdentifier.title: Display As Label Identifier
displayAsLabelIdentifier.description: Configures the label used for representing attribute filter elements in UI.

factIdentifier.title: Fact Identifier
factIdentifier.description: A fact identifier in the form of fact/{id}.

metricIdentifier.title: Metric Identifier
metricIdentifier.description: A metric identifier in the form of metric/{id}.

dashboardFilterGroup.title: Dashboard filter group
dashboardFilterGroup.description: A group of dashboard filters displayed together in the filter bar

title.description: Display title for the filter group

filters.description: Filters contained in this group (only attribute and date filters, no nested groups)

dashboardFiltersNoGroups.title: Dashboard Filters (no groups)
dashboardFiltersNoGroups.description: Dashboard filters that cannot contain filter groups - only attribute and date filters

from.description: A period start date as YYYY-MM-DD

to.description: A period end date as YYYY-MM-DD

mode.description: Setting filter mode to readonly will disable the filter. Setting it to hidden will hide the filter from the dashboard. Setting it to active will enable the filter.

empty_values.description: Controls how empty values are handled in the filter.

date.description: An id of the date dataset to be used for date filter

from.description: A period start as number, from today

to.description: A period end as number, from today

mode.description: Setting filter mode to readonly will disable the filter. Setting it to hidden will hide the filter from the dashboard. Setting it to active will enable the filter.

empty_values.description: Controls how empty values are handled in the filter.

date.description: An id of the date dataset to be used for date filter

using.description: Attribute or label to use in this filter.

multiselect.description: Whether the filter should allow multiple selection

mode.description: Setting filter mode to readonly will disable the filter. Setting it to hidden will hide the filter from the dashboard. Setting it to active will enable the filter.

display_as.description: Configures the label used for representing attribute filter elements in UI.

parents.description: An ids of the parent local attribute or label filter

oneOf.title: Local attribute filter
oneOf.description: Local attribute or date filter to use as parent

using.description: Local date filter to use as parent

common.description: Whether the parent filter is common date or special date

metric_filters.description: An id of the attributes, labels, facts or metrics to validate the filter by

using.description: Attribute or label to use in this filter.

multiselect.description: Whether the filter should allow multiple selection

mode.description: Setting filter mode to readonly will disable the filter. Setting it to hidden will hide the filter from the dashboard. Setting it to active will enable the filter.

display_as.description: Configures the label used for representing attribute filter elements in UI.

parents.description: An ids of the parent local attribute or label filter

oneOf.title: Local attribute filter
oneOf.description: Local attribute or date filter to use as parent

using.description: Local date filter to use as parent

common.description: Whether the parent filter is common date or special date

metric_filters.description: An id of the attributes, labels, facts or metrics to validate the filter by

using.description: Attribute or label to use in this filter.

multiselect.description: Whether the filter should allow multiple selection

mode.description: Setting filter mode to readonly will disable the filter. Setting it to hidden will hide the filter from the dashboard. Setting it to active will enable the filter.

display_as.description: If specified, the attribute filter will display the elements in selected label form.

parents.description: An ids of the parent local attribute or label filter

oneOf.title: Local attribute filter
oneOf.description: Local attribute or date filter to use as parent

using.description: Local date filter to use as parent

common.description: Whether the parent filter is common date or special date

metric_filters.description: An id of the attributes, labels, facts or metrics to validate the filter by

using.description: Date dataset identifier to use for this field.

granularity.description: A granularity to use in relative date filter

with.description: Attribute filters to apply together with this date filter.

empty_values.description: Controls how empty values are handled in the filter.

using.description: Date dataset identifier to use for this field.

granularity.description: A granularity to use in relative date filter

from.description: A relative granularity from which the filter will be applied.

to.description: A relative granularity to which the filter will be applied.

with.description: Attribute filters to apply together with this date filter.

empty_values.description: Controls how empty values are handled in the filter.

using.description: Date dataset identifier to use for this field.

from.description: A date from which the filter will be applied.

to.description: A date to which the filter will be applied.

with.description: Attribute filters to apply together with this date filter.

empty_values.description: Controls how empty values are handled in the filter.

using.description: Attribute or label to use in this filter.

display_as.description: Configures the label used for representing attribute filter elements in UI.

conditions.description: Optional list of conditions for this filter. Conditions are applied as AND during execution.

condition.description: Condition to use for this filter.

using.description: Metric or local metric to use in this filter.

null_values_as_zero.description: Null values will be treated as zero.

dimensionality.description: Optional array of attribute or label references or local identifiers to apply dimensionality to the filter.

using.description: Metric or local metric to use in this filter.

condition.description: Condition to use for this filter.

value.description: Value to use in condition for this filter.

null_values_as_zero.description: Null values will be treated as zero.

dimensionality.description: Optional array of attribute or label references or local identifiers to apply dimensionality to the filter.

using.description: Metric or local metric to use in this filter.

condition.description: Condition to use for this filter.

from.description: From value to use in condition for this filter.

to.description: To value to use in condition for this filter.

null_values_as_zero.description: Null values will be treated as zero.

dimensionality.description: Optional array of attribute or label references or local identifiers to apply dimensionality to the filter.

allOf.title: All
allOf.description: For MVF with operator "All" (no filtering). Such filter can be present without a condition and is treated as a no-op.

using.description: Metric or local metric to use in this filter.

conditions.description: Optional list of conditions for this filter. Conditions are applied as AND during execution.

dimensionality.description: Optional array of attribute or label references or local identifiers to apply dimensionality to the filter.

condition.description: Condition to use for this filter. If omitted, the condition represents ALL (no filtering).

value.description: Value to use in condition for this filter.

from.description: From value to use in condition for this filter.

to.description: To value to use in condition for this filter.

using.description: Metric identifier to use for this filter.

attribute.description: Attribute identifier to use for this filter.

bottom.description: Number of bottom N values to use in this filter.

top.description: Number of top N values to use in this filter.
